name: East Outlet dam (Kennebec River, Moosehead Lake)
notes: Fly-fishing-only reach; primary access at the dam.

name: East Outlet - Wilson's Road primitive ramps
notes: Small primitive launches along the road paralleling the river (approx.).

name: Grand Lake Stream fishway (West Grand Lake dam)
notes: Classic landlocked salmon water below the dam.

name: Kennebec River access (The Forks)
notes: Salmon and brook trout fishing at the Kennebec/Dead confluence.

name: Kennebec River access (Bingham)
notes: Several access areas on the Wyman tailwater reach.
